title: ATL Vegan Festival
location: Piedmont Park, 1332 Monroe Dr NE, Atlanta, GA
description: Plant-based food festival in Piedmont Park — perfect for a Sunday stroll date: graze vegan vendors, people-watch, and save room for dessert.

title: ATLANTA'S AFRO CARIBBEAN FEST
location: Embr Lounge, 1136 Crescent Ave NE, Atlanta, GA
price: Free entry before 5 PM w/ RSVP (21+)
description: Indoor + outdoor dancefloor with celebrity DJs spinning 90s/00s reggae, Afrobeats, and R&B. Couples who want to dance the afternoon away — and grab VIP booths for a special evening.

title: NE-YO & AKON: Nights Like This Tour 2026
location: Lakewood Amphitheatre, Atlanta, GA
description: Two R&B heavyweights on one stage outdoors. Easy summer date — pack a blanket, sing every word, and turn it into a late-night drive home.

title: Harry Connick, Jr. at Chastain Park
location: Synovus Bank Amphitheater at Chastain Park, Atlanta, GA
description: Old-school crooner charm under the trees at Chastain. Bring a picnic dinner, a bottle of wine, and the kind of date that feels like a movie scene.

title: Savanna Nights at Zoo Atlanta — 2000s Night
location: Zoo Atlanta, 800 Cherokee Ave SE, Atlanta, GA
description: After-hours zoo for adults only — Y2K soundtrack, animals, drinks, and a slow walk together. One of Atlanta's most original date nights.

title: Vinnie D. & Co. — Better Get It in Your Soul (Soul Jazz)
location: Red Light Cafe, Atlanta, GA
description: Intimate soul-jazz set in a small Atlanta room. Perfect 'discover a new favorite artist together' date with cocktails and close-quarter conversation.

title: Prima Materia — Group Exhibition Opening
location: Empire Arts Gallery / The Artifice, Atlanta, GA
description: New group show exploring the 'sacred beginning of the creative act.' Walk the walls together, debate your favorites, and grab a coffee after.

title: A Midsummer Night's Dream — Atlanta Shakespeare Company
location: Shakespeare Tavern Playhouse, 499 Peachtree St NE, Atlanta, GA
description: Shakespeare's most romantic comedy in an intimate playhouse with pub-style food and drink before the show. Date-night classic that ends in a fairy-tale mood.

title: Screenings on The Green — Movie Night
location: The Green at High Street Atlanta, Atlanta, GA
description: First-Thursday outdoor film on the lawn with free popcorn. Pack a blanket, low-effort, high-charm — exactly the kind of last-minute date that always works.

title: Summer Slamajama — Gallery Opening at Anne Irwin Fine Art
location: Anne Irwin Fine Art, Atlanta, GA
description: Summer kickoff gallery party — 'come dance with us,' per the invite. Bubbles, art, and a built-in dance floor. Wear something fun.

title: Glow Nights After Hours at Georgia Aquarium
location: Georgia Aquarium, 225 Baker St NW, Atlanta, GA
description: First-ever after-hours adults-only Aquarium party — cocktails, live DJ, bioluminescent décor, and Las Vegas acrobats under the tanks. The most 'wow' date on this list.

title: Karlous Miller at Helium Comedy Club
location: Helium Comedy Club, Atlanta, GA
price: Ticketed (Couple's Package: 2 seats + $90 F&B credit available)
description: Atlanta's own 85 South star with an edgy, high-energy set. Couple's package is a built-in date — premium seats plus food and drinks, no planning required.

title: T!TTY TKO — Cosplay Burlesque Game Show
location: Red Light Cafe, Atlanta, GA
description: Burlesque meets game show meets cosplay. Late-night cheeky date for couples who like their entertainment with a wink.

title: Dexter Tolson & Friends — Live Jazz
location: Vibes Jazz Cafe at The Red Door, Atlanta, GA
description: Atlanta jazz staple in an intimate listening-room setting. Date-night move: cocktails, small tables, and a soundtrack that does the flirting for you.

title: Friday Night Live — 404 Theory Modern Jazz Trio
location: The Reading Room, Atlanta, GA
description: Piano-bass-drums trio with a guest — small-room jazz, made for leaning in close. Great weeknight date for music-head couples.

title: BIG JAM (BYOB) at CLTV Studio
location: CLTV Studio, Atlanta, GA
description: BYOB jam session in a creative studio — bring your own drinks and your dancing shoes. Looser, less-formal date with a built-in community vibe.

title: Mrs. Roper Drag Queen Bingo at Lips Atlanta
location: Lips Atlanta, North Druid Hills, GA
description: Three-course dinner, drag bingo, and audience participation. The kind of couples' night out where you laugh until your face hurts.

title: Lionel Richie & Earth, Wind & Fire — Sing A Song All Night Long
location: State Farm Arena, 1 State Farm Dr, Atlanta, GA
description: Two Hall-of-Fame acts, one night, every song you grew up on. Iconic 'anniversary date' energy — sing loud, hold hands, leave hoarse.

title: R&B Singers Phillippia and Yoshi — Dinner and a Show
location: Perfect Note Atlanta, Marietta, GA
description: Intimate R&B duo with an optional dinner service — exactly the kind of 'sit close, share a plate, listen to a great voice' date that's hard to find.

title: Salsa at Politan Row at Colony Square
location: Politan Row at Colony Square, Atlanta, GA
description: Outdoor salsa night at a food-hall courtyard — dance, snack, repeat. Great 'we keep saying we should learn salsa' couples' date.

title: Jazz Brunch — Yolanda Loy at City Winery
location: City Winery Atlanta, 650 North Ave NE, Atlanta, GA
description: Brunch + jazz, one ticket. Sunday date that doesn't require planning past 11 AM — show up, eat, sip, listen.

title: Savanna Nights at Zoo Atlanta — Taylor Swift & Friends
location: Zoo Atlanta, 800 Cherokee Ave SE, Atlanta, GA
description: Taylor Swift tribute night with friendship bracelets, animals, and cocktails. Make it a theme: Swiftie outfit, friendship bracelets, and a slow zoo walk.
